articles.title: Tesla Autonomy Making Streets Safer in Europe
articles.description: ROME/PARIS/BERLIN – Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (FSD) Supervised system, the product of Elon Musk’s relentless 12-year focus on end-to-end neural networks, is now being experienced by European leaders in a series of high-profile demonstrations that have no rivals. Rome Mayor First to Ride Elon’s Vision in Italy On Wednesday, Rome Mayor Roberto Gualtieri rode as a […]

articles.description:
SpaceX’s Starlink has officially launched its high-speed satellite internet service across South Korea today. The launch follows regulatory approvals granted earlier this year that allowed foreign satellite operators to provide broadband services in South Korea. […]

articles.title: Tesla Model Y L in China Now Sold Out Until February 2026
articles.description:
Tesla’s new six-seat Model Y L continues to post massive demand in China, with the extended-wheelbase variant now fully sold out through January 2026. Estimated delivery dates for new orders have officially slipped into February 2026, according to updated guidance on Tesla’s online configurator and data shared by well-known industry tracker @Tslachan on X. This […]

articles.title: Starlink Sets South Korea Launch for Dec. 4
articles.description:
SpaceX’s Starlink satellite internet service is officially going live in South Korea on December 4, marking yet another major expansion for the company’s rapidly growing global network. Starlink Korea confirmed the launch this week and has already begun accepting pre-orders for its Residential plan, priced at 87,000 won (roughly $59 USD) per month. According to […]

articles.title: Tesla Warns U.K. EV Rollback Risks Climate Targets
articles.description:
Newly disclosed government documents show Tesla privately warned the U.K. that loosening electric vehicle regulations could slow battery-electric sales and jeopardize the country’s climate targets. The submissions — obtained by EV newsletter Fast Charge via a freedom of information request and first reported by The Guardian — reveal Tesla urging the government not to introduce […]

The post Tesla Warns U.K. EV Rollback Risks Climate Targets appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Waymo Expands Robotaxi Testing to Four More U.S. Cities
articles.description:
Waymo is accelerating its expansion across the U.S. once again, announcing today that it has officially begun testing in four new cities: Baltimore, St. Louis, Pittsburgh, and Philadelphia. The company will start with manual driving as it maps local roads, gathers data, and works toward eventually offering driverless robotaxi service to the public. The move […]

The post Waymo Expands Robotaxi Testing to Four More U.S. Cities appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.

The expansion comes just days after Tesla first announced the initiative across select European markets last week, with ride-alongs going live earlier this week. According […]
